name: cadence
description: Issue-driven, multi-agent development workflow with git worktrees, structured phases, and specialist delegation

interface.shortDescription: Claude Cadence compatibility layer for Codex
interface.longDescription: Thin Codex packaging that reuses Claude Cadence prompts, scripts, and CLAUDE.md as the source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Use $lead to implement a ticket with Cadence.
Use $refine to bring an unrefined ticket to ready.
Use $create-ticket to create a new Cadence ticket.
